generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, I've always believed in being prepared. But have you noticed how civil defense funding gets sidelined while politicians focus on flashy military projects? My neighbor, a retired nurse, pointed out that our community's emergency response plans haven't been updated in years. If we truly value national security, shouldn't we prioritize practical preparedness that protects all Americans? #CommunitySafety #NationalSecurity
